revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:1937 in Japan]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:1937 in Japan]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 3 | y = 7 | cat = 日本 }} [[Category:1937年|にほん]] [[Category:各年の日本]] [[en:Category:1937 in Japan]] [...'
r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: fr, tr 除去: sv, zh
r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: [[no:Kategori:1937 i Japan]]
r2.7.2) (ロボットによる 追加: [[id:Kategori:Jepang dalam tahun 1937]]
r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: [[fa:رده:ژاپن در ۱۹۳۷ (میلادی)]]
r2.7.3) (ロボットによる: [[vi:Thể loại:Nhật Bản 1937]]を追加
ボット: 言語間リンク 8 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[:d:Q6789420]] に転記
revision.text:
{{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 3 | y = 7 | cat = 日本 }}
[[Category:1937年|にほん]] [[Category:各年の日本]]

{{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 3 | y = 7 | cat = 日本 }}
[[Category:1937年の各国|にほん]] [[Category:1937年のアジア|にほん]] [[Category:各年の日本]]

{{Commonscat|1937 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 3 | y = 7 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1937年の各国 }}
[[Category:1937年のアジア|にほん]]

{{Commonscat|1937 in Japan}} {{Year by category | m = 1 | c = 9 | d = 3 | y = 7 | cat = 日本 | sortkey = にほん | parent = 各年の日本 | subcat = 1937年の各国 }}
[[Category:1937年のアジア|にほん]] [[Category:1930年代の日本|*7]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert empty category to redirect
revision.text: #redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
[[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
#redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
[[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]

[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1937年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1937]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۳۷-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[br:Category:1937 e Japan]] [[bs:Category:1937. u Japanu]] [[ckb:Category:ژاپۆن لە ١٩٣٧]] [[commons:Category:1937 in Japan]] [[eo:Category:1937 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1937]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۳۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1937 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1937 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1937]] [[ko:Category:1937년 일본]] [[no:Category:1937 i Japan]] [[ru:Category:1937 год в Японии]] [[sr:Category:Јапан у 1937.]] [[tr:Category:1937'de Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1937 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:1937ء میں جاپان]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1937]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1937 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1937年日本]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1937年竣工の日本の建築物]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Redirect categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"

revision.text:
{{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}} {{Commons category}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6789420)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Year in country category|Japan|Asia|}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6789420}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1937 in Japan]]
<!--categories-->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1937_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
